title: verbascum × digitalifolium
intro: Verbascum × digitalifolium, also known as Digitalis purpurea × Verbascum phlomoides, is a hybrid plant that combines the characteristics of foxglove (Digitalis purpurea) and mullein (Verbascum phlomoides). It has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to stimulate cardiac activity and improve heart function. The plant is rich in cardiac glycosides, which have been shown to have a positive effect on cardiovascular health, reducing the risk of heart failure and improving overall well-being. In herbal preparations, Verbascum × digitalifolium is often used in teas, tinctures, and infusions to promote heart health and alleviate symptoms of heart-related conditions.
